APPROVE
Clean, mechanical token migration across all 5 specified shell micro-components with consistent dark-mode parity (`dark:dark-*` variants). No functional changes; only class strings and one `$derived` computed class in ConfirmDialog were touched. Token usage is consistent with the requested vocabulary (border-line, bg-surface/canvas/elevated, fg-ink/muted, accent-lever, error, rounded-none).
